message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor Member

participant ":TicketDetailPage" as TDP
participant ":TicketDetailContainer" as TDC
participant ":AttendanceService (Frontend)" as ASF
participant ":Router" as Router
participant ":AttendanceHTTPTransport" as AHT
participant ":AttendanceEndpoint" as AE
participant ":AttendanceService" as AS
participant ":RequesterService" as RS
participant ":AttendanceCommand" as AC
participant ":AttendanceQuery" as AQ

Member -> TDP : Click "Yes" Button
TDP -> TDC : handleConfirmation(input)
TDC -> ASF : confirmAttendance(classId, payload)
ASF -> Router : route("PATCH", "v2/class/{class_id}/attendance/confirmation")
Router -> AHT : Confirmation(AttendanceService, []ServerOption)
AHT -> AE : Confirmation(AttendanceService)
AE -> AS : Confirmation(context, payload)
AS -> AS : Validate()

alt ["Data Valid"]
    AS -> AQ : GetPureModel(context, []SliceCondition)
    AQ --> AS : ticket
    
    alt ["Ticket Status is Accepted"]
        AS -> AC : Register(context, []payload)
        AS -> RS : UpdateRequestStatus(context, ticket)
        RS --> AS : is updated
    end
    
    AS -> AS : is updated
    AS -> AS : response := Response(is updated, nil)
    AS --> AE : response
    AE --> AHT : response
    AHT --> Router : response
    Router --> ASF : response
    ASF --> TDC : response
    TDC --> TDP : response
    TDP --> Member : response

else
    AS --> AQ : UnprocessableEntity
    AQ --> AE : UnprocessableEntity
    AE --> AHT : UnprocessableEntity
    AHT --> Router : UnprocessableEntity
    Router --> ASF : UnprocessableEntity
    ASF --> TDC : UnprocessableEntity
    TDC --> TDP : UnprocessableEntity
    TDP --> Member : UnprocessableEntity
end

@enduml
```
